CustomField.description: To update this photo, change the URL address in the Image URL field.
CustomField.formula: IF ( HOMEtracker__Image_URL__c != null, IMAGE( HOMEtracker__Image_URL__c, Name, 300, 300), '')
CustomField.inlineHelpText: To update this photo, change the URL address in the Image URL field.
CustomField.label: Property Photo
